def create_user(
    username: str,
    email: str,
    first_name: str,
    last_name: str,
    age: int,
    is_active: bool,
    role: str,
    department: str,
    manager_id: int | None,
    salary: float,
    start_date: str,
    phone: str,
    address: str,
    city: str,
    state: str,
    zip_code: str,
) -> dict:
    return {
        "username": username,
        "email": email,
        "first_name": first_name,
        "last_name": last_name,
        "age": age,
        "is_active": is_active,
        "role": role,
        "department": department,
        "manager_id": manager_id,
        "salary": salary,
        "start_date": start_date,
        "phone": phone,
        "address": address,
        "city": city,
        "state": state,
        "zip_code": zip_code,
    }


def send_email(
    recipient: str,
    sender: str,
    subject: str,
    body: str,
    cc: str,
    bcc: str,
    priority: str,
    format_type: str,
    attachments: list[str],
    read_receipt: bool,
) -> bool:
    pass
